mission.title: koordinator: [question] Use cycles instead of ref-cycles
mission.description: [question] Use cycles instead of ref-cycles. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current koordinator deployment
steps.description:
Verify your koordinator version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n koordinator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=koordinator
helm list -n koordinator 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working koordinator installation.

steps.title: Review koordinator configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant koordinator configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n koordinator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=koordinator
kubectl get configmap -n koordinator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=koordinator
```
**What happened:**
Use ref-cycles as CPI factor.
**What you expected to happen:**
Use cycles as CPI factor.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [question] Use cycles instead of ref-cycles
steps.description:
### Ⅰ. Describe what this PR does
fix CPI compute error

### Ⅱ. Does this pull request fix one issue?
### Ⅲ. Describe how to verify it
use perf to verify
### Ⅳ. Special notes for reviews

### V. Checklist

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n koordinator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=koordinator
kubectl get events -n koordinator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[question] Use cycles instead of ref-cycles" is functioning correctly.
